chats.preview: Honestly we’d love to explore what a partnership could look like — no bankers yet, just us.
Maya: Founder pinged me directly. This is a proprietary look before any process — let’s not lose it.
Can share the data-rights overview under NDA. That’s the part most investors miss.
Priya: sensor telemetry looks proprietary and sticky. AI-readiness likely strong.
Not in a rush, but I want to get the ownership question right. Open to an informal chat.
Reminder: weekly pipeline sync moved to Friday 10:00.

emails.subject: Re: Great to reconnect at the DACH Food Summit
emails.preview: Really enjoyed our chat. We’re finally open to bringing in a growth partner — would value your perspective on how you’d think about it.

emails.subject: Preliminary numbers ahead of our call
emails.preview: Sharing last year’s P&L and the bolt-on pipeline informally so you have context before we speak Thursday.

emails.subject: Frostbite may run a limited process in Q3
emails.preview: Heads up — the family is testing appetite quietly before deciding whether to launch. Wanted you in early.

emails.subject: Frostbite Foods — founder open to minority?
emails.preview: Notes from the summit + my read on why this fits the convenience-grocery mandate. Recommend we move quickly.

emails.subject: Thanks for the intro — happy to chat
emails.preview: Appreciate Daniel connecting us. We’re selectively adding a strategic partner alongside the insider round — open to a conversation.

emails.subject: GridSense round is oversubscribed — they want a strategic
emails.preview: They’d prefer a partner who understands energy infra. Their sensor-data moat is the real story. Can intro this week.

emails.subject: GridSense AI — proprietary sensor data moat
emails.preview: Did a quick tech read: defensibility looks genuine, not a GPT wrapper. Worth a deeper AI-readiness pass.

emails.subject: Succession planning — exploring options
emails.preview: As you know I’m stepping back in the next couple of years. Starting to think about the right long-term home for the business.

emails.subject: Meridian benefiting from reshoring tailwind
emails.preview: Order book up sharply as OEMs dual-source away from tariff-exposed regions. Founder-owned, no PE on the cap table.

emails.subject: Meridian Components — founder retirement window
emails.preview: Succession + reshoring = a clean entry. Relationship is cold though — we last spoke ~6 months ago.

emails.subject: Five Things to Start Your Day
emails.preview: Markets mixed as rate-cut bets firm; European consumer names in focus…

emails.subject: Scheduled maintenance this weekend
emails.preview: The deal model repository will be briefly unavailable Saturday 22:00–23:00 CET.

meetings.title: DACH Food Summit — booth conversation
meetings.preview: Founder volunteered that the family is finally aligned on external capital. Wants a partner, not an exit. Very warm.

meetings.title: Intro call recap — Frostbite
meetings.attendees: Markus Vogel (CFO), Maya Olsen, Eleanor Bishop
meetings.preview: Walked through margins and the bolt-on pipeline. CFO comfortable sharing more under NDA. Next: preliminary model.

meetings.title: GridSense product demo — notes
meetings.preview: Live demo of the grid-optimisation model. Proprietary sensor network is the moat. CEO open to a strategic partner.

meetings.title: Meridian site visit — notes
meetings.preview: Founder candid about succession timeline. Order book strong on reshoring. No active process — early but real.

meetings.title: Weekly pipeline sync
meetings.preview: Reviewed 14 active screens; agreed to prioritise founder-led consumer names.

signalCompanies.name: Frostbite Foods
signalCompanies.summary: Founder-led DACH frozen & convenience foods maker; three bolt-ons available.

crm.note: Prior partnership conversation logged at last year’s summit. Warm intro available — founder receptive to a minority growth deal.

signalCompanies.name: GridSense AI
signalCompanies.summary: Energy-grid AI with proprietary sensor data; Series C insider round oversubscribed.

crm.note: No CRM record — net-new target. A Dynamics 365 record will be created automatically when the deal moves to auto-screen (O2).

signalCompanies.name: Meridian Components
signalCompanies.summary: Precision components maker riding the reshoring tailwind; founder nearing retirement.

crm.note: Known contact from a prior process; no active opportunity. Relationship is cold — re-engagement needed.
